svg.text: AI generates the picture; code adds every text label, arrow, and scale bar afterward.

g.text: Substrate (no text, no labels, no arrows)
prompt: "lateral view of a human brain in watercolour
labels, arrows, scale bar overlaid as a separate SVG layer

svg.text: Hard ceiling -- AI cannot reliably render text inside the image
no axis numerals -- no equations -- no multi-arrow flowcharts -- no > 5 labelled elements
if your figure needs any of these, use /figures:svg-figure or /figures:scientific-figure instead
